main_direction: Hold source_policy_hybrid_ring_regularization / stablelead_nearest_plus_uniform_tail as the current local lead, keep research in steady_hold + IDLE_GUARD, keep no auto-next ticket, and keep cloud off until a fresh manual problem and a separate explicit downstream decision exist.
current_cloud_blocker: The manually promoted hybrid-ring local lead is now synced as the current local lead, but cloud must remain off. This PROMOTE decision resolves local lead selection only; it does not authorize cloud execution, auto-next ticket generation, or any second candidate. Any later forward move still requires a fresh manual problem and a separate explicit downstream decision.

why_lead: It beat the previous stable lead at the short 10/5 gate on camera, conf_depth, and reg_depth while keeping translation flat.
It also beat the previous stable lead again at the long 100/20 gate and therefore earned a formal provisional_lead before manual promotion.
Manual PROMOTE has now resolved the hold, so this config is the current local lead while cloud stays off and no auto-next ticket is active.

next_local_diagnostic.name: fresh_manual_problem_only_if_later_needed
next_local_diagnostic.goal: Do not auto-open another ticket. Only define a fresh manual problem later if another genuinely new question is needed.

non_goals: Do not arm or run another ticket tonight.
Do not reopen the closed five-family failure batch.
Do not auto-promote to cloud or auto-generate the next question.

nightly_modes.name: steady_hold
nightly_modes.when: The promoted local lead is synced and there is no active approved problem.
steps: Run preflight and consistency as guard-only cleanliness checks.
Keep current_lead_config on the promoted local lead.
Do not open a candidate automatically.

nightly_modes.name: single_candidate_local_gate
nightly_modes.when: A later fresh manual problem explicitly authorizes one new local candidate.
steps: Do not branch into cousin sweeps or a second same-night candidate.

promotion_requirements_before_cloud_cons: Keep cloud off after local promotion; a separate explicit downstream decision is still required.
Do not treat local promotion as implicit cloud authorization.
